de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class Notation.Constant

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.Notation
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.Notation.Constant
  • Enclosing class:
    Notation

    public static final class Notation.Constant
extends Notation
    The standard concrete syntax for constants like true and false.

    • Method Detail

      • print

        public void print(Term t,
                  LogicPrinter sp)
           throws IOException
        Description copied from class: Notation
        Print a term to a LogicPrinter. Concrete subclasses override this to call one of the printXYZTerm of LogicPrinter, which do the layout.
        Specified by:
        print in class Notation
        Throws:
        IOException
